stemHtml: A Captain and an engineer are performing a walk-around together when they discover a 3 amp blown fuse. The engineer only has 10amp and 5 amp fuses left to use, and the Captain gives them permission to replace the 3 amp fuse with the 5 amp fuse. What is a potential problem associated with this?

options.a: This is acceptable and no problems will occur as there is only a 2 amp difference.
options.b: The circuit will overheat and the fuse will blow immediately.
options.d: Overcurrents will go undetected for a period of time, and the fuse may take longer to blow due to the higher rating.
